question: According to the 'How quick and big would a software intelligence explosion be?' paper, what factor of software progress speed-up does the AI 2027 estimate suggest ASARA would produce?

expected_citation.title: How quick and big would a software intelligence explosion be?

source_passage: AI 2027 interviewed AI researchers and found that with 10X less compute they thought they'd make 40% slower progress. From this, along with a few other assumptions, they estimate that ASARA would accelerate software progress by a factor of 21X.
